name: Blueberry Oat Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon lemon juice to sour milk
recipeInstructions:
Frozen berries mixed in without thawing.
1. Combine milk and lemon juice in a 4-cup measure. Let stand for a few minutes.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and brown sugar. Stir well.
3. Add the egg and melted butter to the oat mixture. Mix until just combined.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until all are moistened. Gently fold in the blueberries.
5. Fill prepared muffin cups about 3/4 full. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until the top springs back and is lightly browned.
